description: Product Description Tired of always carrying heavy watering cans? Our exquisite watering can will definitely make hydrating your plants easier and more fun. The easy- grip handle is designed to give you comfort. Our watering pot is the best at filling and cleaning. The top hole is big enough that you can see the water level and it allows the pot to be filled with 1L of water. Say goodbye to stressful posture and overflowing water. No need to be close to your plant anymore. The long stem spout of the watering can is designed for long reach and better water flow control. Keep your plants happy! Plant size determine how much water your plant needs. For large plants: Pour water and let it soak in. Repeat until soil is saturated. Let it dry until watering again. For smaller plants: Do a semi-soak by placing the potted plant in a tray and pouring water over the soil until the tray has about ¼ of an inch of water. Let the plant sit for 8 hours, then drain the water.
